summary: Enable confirmed DFM RPC server write-back.
details: Updating the remote DFM through RPC now asks for an additional confirmation before using RPC server write access.
When the local DFM JSON is newer, the comparison window uses a `Confirm` action for the Local card and shows an app-styled RPC server write confirmation before sending the update.
Confirmed `SyncDFM` requests include the local DFM JSON path so `arcrho_bridge` can write excluded ratios, selected formulas, and notes back into the RPC server DFM method and return a status JSON.
